overview:
## Return Value

The shared secret, and its encapsulated version.

## Discussion

Share the encapsulated secret with the person who has the [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey]. They use [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey/decapsulate(_:)] to recover the shared secret.

# encapsulate()

**Instance Method**

Generates and encapsulates a shared secret.

## Declaration

```swift
func encapsulate() throws -> KEM.EncapsulationResult
```

## Return Value

The shared secret, and its encapsulated version.

## Discussion

Share the encapsulated secret with the person who has the [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey]. They use [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey/decapsulate(_:)] to recover the shared secret.
